data.title: EXACT Therapeutics Secures NOK 145 Million in New Shares

Lar España Real Estate SOCIMI’s Board of Directors has unanimously approved a report concerning Helios RE’s voluntary public acquisition offer for all its shares. data.title: Corpay Inc CFO Tom Panther Resigns for New Role
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Corpay Inc ( (CPAY) ) has shared an announcement.

Corpay, Inc. announced that its CFO, Tom Panther, will resign effective March 15, 2025, to join the National Christian Foundation. While the company searches for a successor, Panther commits to a smooth transition, emphasizing Corpay’s strong position in corporate payments. The company expects its Q4 2024 results to align with previous guidance, while highlighting various risks impacting the financial landscape.

See more insights into CPAY stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ivanhoe Mines Hits Record Copper Production Milestone
data.description:
Ivanhoe Mines (TSE:IVN) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Ivanhoe Mines has achieved a record copper production of 45,019 tonnes in November at their Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The newly ramped-up Phase 3 concentrator also recorded an impressive 90% recovery rate over 24 hours. This milestone positions the DRC as a major player in the global copper market.

For further insights into TSE:IVN stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SysGroup Chairman Boosts Stake Amid AI Growth Focus

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

SysGroup’s Executive Chairman, Heejae Chae, has increased his stake in the company by purchasing 150,000 ordinary shares at 23 pence each, bringing his total interest to approximately 9.47% of the issued share capital. This move underscores confidence in SysGroup’s strategic direction as a key player in cloud, data, and security services, supporting AI and ML transformation.

data.title: Thryv Holdings Expands with Keap Acquisition and SaaS Focus
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Thryv Holdings ( (THRY) ) has provided an update.

Thryv Holdings, Inc. is gearing up for significant growth with its recent acquisition of Keap, enhancing its small business software platform. At its Analyst Day event, Thryv outlined strategic priorities, including the launch of new centers and a focus on SaaS revenue growth, aiming for robust financial performance by 2025. With an eye on international market expansion, Thryv is streamlining operations, exiting marketing services by 2028 to focus on its core software offerings.

data.title: Animalcare Group Expands with £20M Fundraise
data.description:
Animalcare (GB:ANCR) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Animalcare Group PLC successfully raised £20 million through an oversubscribed share placement to partly finance the acquisition of Randlab, a veterinary medicine company. This strategic acquisition aligns with Animalcare’s growth objectives and strengthens its product portfolio. The new shares will account for approximately 12.5% of the expanded share capital upon admission to the AIM market.

data.title: Autagco Ltd. Secures Convertible Loan for Expansion
data.description:
Lifebrandz Ltd. (SG:1D3) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Autagco Ltd., formerly known as LifeBrandz Ltd., has secured a S$500,000 convertible loan from Lenn International Pte. Ltd., allowing the investor the option to convert the loan into shares at a set price. This move aims to support the company’s business expansion and general working capital needs. The company plans to list the conversion shares on the SGX-ST Catalist board, pending necessary approvals.

For further insights into SG:1D3 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
